summary:
MIDDLE EAST CONFLICTS AND ANTISEMITISM: Brandon describes visions of impending major decisions regarding Iran and Pakistan, accompanied by significant disruptions. He details witnessing antisemitism reaching unprecedented levels, particularly in New York City and other global Jewish communities, leading to mass migrations of Jewish people relocating to Israel. In New York City, he recounts seeing widespread fires, riots, and specifically the forty-first floor of a major building engulfed in flames, alongside growing unrest concerning the city's new mayor.

CARTEL OPERATIONS AND SOUTH AMERICAN TURMOIL: Brandon recounts seeing drug cartels in Venezuela and Colombia funding young men to fight against military troops. He describes massive cocaine manufacturing plants housed in rusty, wavy metal buildings near the Colombian border, with distribution networks spreading like veins across Europe, Africa, America, and Asia. Furthermore, he details a vision of the Cuban president hiding in a fortified mountain bunker, plotting to ignite civil unrest and target oil containers using guerrilla warfare and forced conscription of young men.

SOUTH AMERICAN POLITICAL SHIFTS AND REVIVAL: Brandon speaks of Claudia Scheinbaum nervously pacing in a Victorian room, fearful of the cartels backing her, before eventually losing her power and influence. He predicts the rise of a new, polished, business-minded male leader in Mexico who will eliminate corruption and align the Mexican economy closely with the United States and Canada. Accompanying these political shifts, he notes an impending wave of massive revivals sweeping across Mexico, Colombia, Venezuela, Cuba, and Brazil.

GLOBAL GEOPOLITICS AND TERRITORIAL CONFLICTS: Brandon shares a vision regarding Greenland, where citizens are offered over twenty thousand dollars each in a closely split vote orchestrated by the United States, facing opposition from Italy's prime minister. He also mentions British Columbia attempting to secede from Canada to join the United States due to financial troubles. Regarding Asia, he details China plotting to seize Taiwan using advanced, unseen weaponry that could cause the island to fall in three days if not protected by a golden dome of prayer, while South Korea faces ideological infiltration from a Chinese communist spirit operating through North Korea.

ADVANCED TECHNOLOGY AND SECRET SOCIETIES: Brandon describes witnessing crowd control weapons mounted on vehicles that instantly knock protesters unconscious without causing physical harm. He recounts seeing secret laboratories where scientists in white suits develop a limitless, sapphire-blue energy source that runs on water, operating via complex mathematical equations and replacing fossil fuels. Additionally, he details visions of demonic portals or stargates used for time travel, and mentions observing five branches of reptilian humanoid entities intertwined with global royal families.

UNITED STATES POLITICS AND STORMS: Brandon describes President Trump being in a valley of decision regarding major global actions, facing impeachment attempts and significant pressure. He shares a vision of the White House and Capitol Hill surrounded by a massive thunderstorm, with JD Vance appearing in greyscale with a distorted, enlarged head looking toward the White House, while Marco Rubio appears shocked and nervous. He also mentions seeing Melania in a bedazzled ballgown, Barron in a tuxedo, and a newly finished, elegant White House ballroom hosting a summer gathering that feels reminiscent of the patriotic unity following September 11.

GLOBAL WEATHER AND SHAKINGS: Brandon foresees severe weather warfare causing extreme drought, dried-up water sources, and dying wildlife in Australia, which can only be mitigated through prayer. He notes that this environmental hardship will be followed by a massive spiritual awakening and new worship movements in Australia. He concludes by mentioning impending major shakings and subsequent revivals expected in the Philippines, New Zealand, and across the African continent.
rawData: [January 13, 2026]-[The valley of decisions]-[https://youtu.be/hL9Trl2qb9k]-[Well, good evening, everybody. Thank you for joining us again tonight. We'll go over some of the things the Lord showed us last Friday before I took my break. We're backing up for another week of prayer. Thank you for joining me, and we'll see what the Lord has for us tonight. All glory to Jesus. Isn't Jesus wonderful? There's a lot happening in the news, isn't there? But tonight's video is 'The Valley of Decision' for what I'm praying over for President Trump concerning his major decisions that he's going to make. The Lord gave me this in prayer, and I'm just going to jump right into it. I just felt the unction of the Holy Ghost. Thank you, Holy Spirit. When I was in prayer yesterday, I got caught up in the Spirit. Over the next two weeks—I want you to hear this very carefully—major decisions will be made concerning Iran and Pakistan. Major disruptions are about to erupt in Pakistan. I saw Pakistan very clearly. The Lord said there are things about to take place. Now, you might say, 'Well, Brandon, when is that going to take place?' I don't know; I see in part, but I saw Pakistan and Iran highlighted. As I saw this major thing about to happen in Iran, I heard anti-Semitism will be at an all-time high in the days ahead. I saw New York City again. I saw the Jewish community in New York City and in other parts of the United States, as well as Jewish communities in other nations, under great persecution. I saw great anti-Semitism coming at an all-time high in the days ahead concerning the Jewish people. I saw great protests, and I saw that some of them were in danger. When I was shown this, I saw people fleeing to Israel. They were uprooting their families in these major cities and they said, 'We've had enough.' They were getting their things and moving to Israel. I thought that was interesting. I told Diana, 'Would you look that up, if what we're looking at is biblical?' She found scriptures about how God would bring the people back together after they were scattered in the end times. Like I said, I'm not a Bible scholar when it comes to stuff like this. When I'm looking in the spirit and the Lord is showing me things, I thought it was interesting. He said He was bringing His people home. He was bringing the Jewish people home. I saw the Jews going to Israel in mass numbers from persecution that will arise in the days ahead. They were all starting to come back to Jerusalem. I thought that was interesting on a greater scale in the days ahead. I saw fires all over with great protests in New York City. I saw the forty-first floor of a major building in New York City on fire again. I saw a lot of fires in buildings and rioting coming to New York in the days ahead. I thought that was interesting because He keeps showing me this over and over again concerning New York. He was upset again when I was praying in the spirit about the new mayor of New York and the decisions that are already being made. So we saw that. Now, I will go over what the Lord showed us Friday. I saw young men being paid off by the drug cartel in Venezuela trying to raise up an army against our troops that have been on the ground in Venezuela, but it was toward Brazil. I saw Cuba devising a plan on how to create civil unrest in Venezuela and Colombia. I saw the cartel. I saw great operations of cocaine distribution plants—huge operations full of people who looked strung out and broken. I saw ten buildings that looked like metal buildings with waves, like wavy tin that you put on a chicken coop, a pig pen, or a barn. It was designed with metal on the outside, like stucco, but it was rusty. It looked like it was rusty and falling apart. There were white stains on the buildings. There was rust, and I could see where the nail holes were with rust coming down the sides of the buildings. I could see the roof, but they were manufacturing cocaine and drugs in them. It was all in Colombia on the border, and I saw major trafficking of drugs in those areas. As I was looking into this, I saw highways that looked like veins spread out all over Europe, Africa, America, and Asia. I saw the Panama Canal, and they were taking the drugs and distributing them into Asia. I saw Cuba at high alert under great pressure. I saw their president inside of a mountain. He was in a bunker in the mountain, hiding out, afraid of the United States coming in and invading again like they did with Venezuela. He was lying low. He was in the ground similar to Saddam. He was hiding in that bunker, but this man was hiding. He's trying to be cocky because he thinks he's protected by the mountain. It would take something like a bunker buster to get him because there was only one way in and one way out. I could see these men with berets on their heads—some were African-American—standing at the entrance of this vault. It looked like a massive metal structure with a huge door, like something out of Doomsday Preppers. I could see him again devising a plan to raise up soldiers to try to create havoc in Venezuela in the days ahead. How do we bring civil unrest and how do we destroy the oil wells they're after? I saw huge white containers made to hold oil, and they were targeting them. Some were on the water and some were inland, but I could see these containers full of oil and they were targeting them. I saw drones flying in the sky. I could see our Marines protecting these places with heavy artillery, ready in case. The Lord kept saying, 'Guerrilla warfare, guerrilla warfare.' I could hear people coming out of the jungles threatening these young men in the cartel: 'If you don't do what we tell you, we'll eliminate your whole family. You fight for us or we will take out your grandma, your mama, and all your sisters and force them into slavery.' I saw these young men in white T-shirts. They didn't look like they had much. Some had longer hair, but they looked like they were being forced to fight. I saw them being given guns and going into jungle warfare. Some of these people, especially from Cuba, were very familiar with the terrain. I saw over ten thousand people trying to infiltrate to take the land and cause havoc for America in the days ahead. This was also concerning Colombia. I saw things coming for Colombia. I saw Claudia pacing back and forth in a room with old antique furniture. It was beautiful cherrywood furniture. It looked like something out of the Victorian era. It looked very Victorian where she was. She was in a room and on the phone talking to the Colombian president? I don't know who he was or what his title is, but she was talking to him. He acted cocky like he didn't care. She was pacing back and forth with nervous energy. I could see her in her room pacing back and forth, asking, 'What do we do?' She's afraid for her life because of the cartel that is backing her. At times she acted like she was scared for everything because of what's coming: a storm. I told you a major revival is about to hit Mexico. I saw liberation coming for the Mexican people, and for Colombia, Venezuela, and Cuba. A major revival is coming to South America. It's already, I believe, taking place in Brazil, but the Lord showed me a major revival coming in the days ahead for all of South America. But as I was seeing the head of state be cut, the drug distribution and oil revenue, this was about major business concerning backing the dollar and all the things coming for the dollar, trying to sustain life in America. This is what I thought was interesting. Remember I told you I saw the prime minister of Italy—the woman? She does not like the situation with Greenland, and the Lord warned us how many times about her standing up with Mark in Canada, England, Macron, Germany, Finland, and these nations. And I saw a major business deal coming about with the United States of America offering each person in Greenland a sum of money. It was over $20,000 per citizen. It was divided fifty-fifty. I saw a vote coming, but it was split fifty-fifty. A lot of the young people were excited about it; the elders weren't. I saw something with the fishing industry. The elders wanted to keep the way they've always lived, but it was about minerals and all these things. And I saw Trump say, 'I'm going to strongarm them.' This is where the vision stopped. I didn't see that they became a part of America, so I don't want to add to or take away from anything. But as I saw a shaking coming to Canada—specifically British Columbia—I saw they would secede from Canada in the days ahead and become a part of America. British Columbia would try to pull away from Canada because of financial trouble that's coming. I told you I saw Taiwan, and I keep seeing Taiwan. I saw an escalation of things where China was trying to devise a plan with their generals for taking Taiwan. When I see this dome of prayer, I heard the Lord say, 'You can delay the inevitable.' You can delay this through prayer. I saw a golden dome come up over Taiwan on all sides through prayer. But as I was interceding, the Lord said they have not taken their freedom from the communist regime of China seriously over the years. They've taken their freedoms for granted and haven't prayed enough. As I was looking into South Korea, the Lord said it will even be challenging in the days concerning South Korea, and a communist dragon will try to grab onto South Korea. But because there's more prayer root there, it will be held back. As long as my people in South Korea intercede and pray, it will hold back communism from their nation. As long as they humble themselves and pray, turning from their wicked ways, He said, 'Brandon, I will have a hedge of my protection over South Korea.' I saw it trying to infiltrate. It was a Chinese-looking spirit, like a snake or a dragon coming out of China into North Korea, trying to come over. It was a bad way of thinking through their government and their politics. He said it's trying to get a stronghold through their leaders. They don't have the right leaders. Pray for their leaders; it's an infiltration from China coming in through North Korea. It's a spirit that's trying to hook them, but they will be a major pillar in the end-time church. Revival will go out from there if they pray. But I saw Taiwan with this golden dome on all sides; if the people will pray. If they don't, they'll fall within three days. I saw they'll fight for one day, then into the second, but by the end of the second day, it will completely fold. I saw the Chinese government using weapons that have never been used before, similar to what America did to Venezuela. They have the same technological weaponry capabilities, maybe even better in some ways. I still believe America is top, but there were things that China had that even America didn't have—secret things—and they would use them as a flex. These people had artillery, but it was no match for what China would try to do. It fell in three days, just like that. When I see all these things in the spirit and the Lord warns me, I know we can pray. That's why the Lord said, 'Cover them in prayer.' I saw a dome of glory around them, and He said, 'You can hold it and delay the inevitable of what will come in the days ahead.' Delay it. But as I saw Trump say this right here—you can play it: 'It is a source of pride for him. He considers it to be a part of China, and that's up to him what he's going to be doing. But I've expressed to him that I would be very unhappy if he did that, and I don't think he'll do that. I hope he doesn't do that. So you don't think you've set a precedent? He may do it after we have a different president, but I don't think he's going to do it with me as president. Supposing you're Xi Jinping and you've watched the events of the past; you're probably impressed with it.' 'The special operators—he was impressed. You may also be thinking that if you're Xi, you could use the same logic to decapitate and control Taiwan, or why couldn't Putin use that same argument to grab the rest of Ukraine or go beyond into other former Soviet states? In other words, have you created a precedent that you may come to regret later on?' 'No. Because this was a real threat. You didn't have people pouring into China. You didn't have drugs pouring into China. You didn't have the jails of Taiwan opened up and the people pouring into China. There aren't that many people in the jails, but you didn't have hundreds of thousands of people coming from jails and mental institutions. But Taiwan—she would tell you Taiwan's a threat to China, that it's a separatist operation. What's the source of Xi's pride for him?' So in his mind, it's already theirs. The way it sounded to me, if they take it, I hope he doesn't do it in my term, but even then, it didn't sound like he's going to resist it. So maybe he will, maybe he won't, I don't know. So it kind of went with what I've been seeing. Number two was praying over what I saw about the government coming in, and I saw Russia come in and just take out Zelensky and their government and all the things that are escalating in Europe. So you've seen a lot of the shorts that my son has been making. He has been hard at work, hasn't he? Making shorts and making drawings. You know, everybody said, 'Brandon, can you comment on some of these things that you posted?' No, it's—we did it like The Economist. We were having fun putting on there. There's no explanation. I'm not here to interpret a vision of what I've seen. I put on what I saw. Now, The Economist doesn't interpret what they put on there and tell you, 'This is what we're trying to say.' You pray about it. You pray about every person that I put on there. I'm not saying the Lord didn't tell me to do that. He said, 'Be bold and put this on there and then walk away.' So that's what we did, and we're making a new one. It's going to be even better than this last one. Braden said, 'That was fun. I enjoyed that. Let's make another one.' So we're making another one. It will be even more detailed. The next one we work on is going to be a piece of work, but it's going to be an amazing art piece. I'm excited about it. I told him, 'We'll work on this for a couple of days, a week or so, whatever, and then we'll present it to the people, and they can look at it.' But it's all the things the Lord has shown me in visions, and we put it together and just present it to the people. So, pretty neat, I guess. So, was that it? No. Play this. Now this is interesting. This is the head of the NATO army, I guess. Yes. Can you play what he says? This is pretty interesting. Experience of the two nations' militaries, a deep commitment to the alliance, and a sense of urgency—and that sense of urgency is essential. When I look around the globe—Russia, China, Iran, North Korea, and others are increasing their collaboration and their cooperation as their interests align against us. We see this clearly in Ukraine. While President Trump pushes for a peaceful resolution to a horrible war, China continues to fund Putin's war machine. Iran continues to supply technology and weapons, and North Korean combat troops remain in Russia on Ukraine's border. And of course, there's a confluence between Russia, Iran, and Venezuela and their dark fleet of oil tankers that is helping to fund the war. In the Arctic and the High North, we see a similar trend. Russian and Chinese vessels are conducting more and more joint patrols. Chinese icebreakers and research vessels are in Arctic waters, and their research is not for peaceful purposes. It's to gain a military advantage. Russia, meanwhile, continues testing advanced capabilities in the Barents Sea. As new shipping routes emerge and new resources are discovered, the Arctic only grows in strategic importance. And all of this comes in the midst of an increasing hybrid threat: airspace violations, GPS and GNSS interference, and the shadow fleet in the Baltic Sea threatening underwater infrastructure. In short, the Arctic and Northern Europe by extension have become a frontline for strategic competition within NATO Allied Command Operations. The command that SACEUR oversees has taken steps to strengthen our deterrent posture, much of which is oriented in that northern region here. Just over a year ago, we established Baltic Sentinel, an activity. Yeah. And then Cuba, and then he had... what is it? Committee address. United States and Russia... and he posted something in Russian. Who did that? 'United States is miscalculating today in retaliation to Iran.' I don't know. He made a post in Russian. Why'd he put it in Russian? I don't know. I think maybe his normal account got banned. But he did have a Russian account. I wonder what that means. Yeah, because there's a reason he chose Russian. I wonder if there's a reason he chose Russian. I'm just telling you, that guy... I pray that his days are numbered. He's a very bad man. Interesting. Well, I guess that's it for that part of it. You know, we can pray now and we'll see what the Lord shows us. We bring all this stuff to you. Braden works hard on it trying to find things to bring to the people to show you what's in the news and what we have seen prophetically that aligns with it. Everybody wants to know why Sister Clipboard wasn't in there because that wasn't prophetic. That's just us having fun. Regardless, he was taking that really seriously—what his mission was to draw that picture out—and we weren't trying to... it's not comical. It's very serious. This is very serious, where we are. We believe in the signs of the times of the coming of the Lord Jesus Christ. So, that's why we didn't put her on there, as funny as it was. Schumer is that, and he'll say in the days ahead, 'Impeach, impeach, impeach.' You'll hear him. And there'll be more and more of an uprising of people trying to get rid of President Trump. That's why we must pray for him to be protected, for him to finish, live long, finish strong, and finish what God has called him to do. So, pretty cool, huh? That's why I believe this channel exists—is to pray for the end-time events. Turkey was saying... Turkey warns the Western world to keep out of Iran and calls out Israel for fueling protesters. I saw that. That's something I saw—Turkey joining up and they became really strong. I just actually saw that. And they would join up with Syria and they would start to beat their war drums. That's kind of interesting. I didn't see that. 'We do not wish to see any chaos in...' You watch it? I'd like to see. I had seen this. I haven't watched it either. Oh, it's probably boring then. 'We do not wish to see any chaos in our...' Yeah, probably. I just read the title, so I think that's good. I just don't want to bore the people. I just think it's interesting because this is along the lines of what we've seen. And then he sent me this... I'm telling you there's a major event about to take place, and that's why there'll be so much anti-Semitism. Do you remember whenever I saw that they would attack their oil wells? That there would be a blow against the oil wells in Iran and it would cause... okay. And this is just me looking into it. Just me talking. You sitting on the couch with me. We got the oil from Venezuela. Now we're telling Russia, 'You can't have it.' China, 'You can't have it. You come over here, we'll blow up your boat. I'm going to make a deal. You're going to touch everything.' That's what he's doing. So then I saw in the days ahead that Iran's oil fields would be on fire, and I thought it would be back last summer. And when I told Braden, I said, 'Where are the oil fields on fire? Are we about to see that?' I saw the price of oil going over $100 a barrel. Would that be a strategic way? Just saying. I'm just me talking. A strategic way looking into a vision of if Israel attacks Iran's oil and wiped out their oil fields in the days ahead, would that make the price of the barrel of oil go up—that we've seized in Venezuela because we're controlling their economy now to boost up the dollar and the petro-dollar? I don't know. Would it? If we eliminate our allies' oil supply and we've taken over Venezuela's oil supply, would that be a strategic move to back the petro-dollar and the United States dollar by making sure that the dollar stays king? I don't know, because I know if Iran's oil is not in play and Russia's oil has sanctions all over it, and the United States of America is controlling Venezuela's oil and our own oil, does that make things more in favor for the petro-dollar? Saudi Arabia's oil is already with us, right? They're with us. Baby, I don't know. It's just me. It's just me looking into it because I saw the oil fields burning in Iran, but then I saw a retaliation of them trying to blow up Venezuela's oil wells concerning America. That's what we saw this last time on Friday. I saw oil wells, and it's even in the cartoon—oil wells on fire. I thought, "Is this symbolic?" The oil is on fire. Why do I keep seeing all the oil on fire? You can show it right there. See it right there? All the oil wells are on fire. It had the B-2 bomber on it. I don't know. We'll see because the Lord told us to watch over this time frame, and it goes up until the 26th. Then he said, "Watch the 3rd of February." Remember? I said, "Third? The third will smell like a turd." It's grotesque, but it's the word he used. The third will come out smelling like a turd. Why? It's a stench before me. He talked about going into the 3rd of February, praying over this time frame before the Olympics start on the 6th. That's why the Olympics are in the background: praying over a Black Swan event. There was a huge black swan floating down the river in Paris. It wasn't a small black swan; this was a massive black swan, so much so that he's riding it now. All right, let's pray. That third was when Maduro got captured, right? Yeah, the third. That's interesting. I saw the third. Was that February 3rd? I'm thinking it's January 3rd. The third. I see in part here, but I think it's interesting because Maduro was captured on the 3rd. I saw the third, but I'm thinking it's February 3rd. He said, "Tres, tres, tres, tres." I kept hearing it in the spirit: "Tres, tres, tres." That's in Spanish. So it happened on the third. "Tres, tres, tres," and I kept saying it. I'm thinking, but I saw snow. I saw mountains, and I saw the number three coming down a mountain. There's no snow in Venezuela. So I don't know. "Tres, tres, tres." It was a purple three. If anybody remembers, I saw a purple three coming down a snowbank. It was highlighted, and I thought that was interesting. I know a lot of this stuff is symbolic for things, like the purple dragon coming up out of the water. It went three times. Why did the purple dragon come up out of the water on the Atlantic side by Miami three times? The third day, and Maduro fell within just a couple of minutes. It happened on the third day. They used weapons that we've never seen, and all their soldiers—we were all vomiting blood. We had stuff coming out of our noses. They were using things—they only had 20-some guys, and there were hundreds of us—and they wiped us out in seconds by pointing this thing at us. I said they'll use a weapon for crowd control in the days ahead, and they'll wipe out crowds with it in a matter of seconds. I didn't see anyone bleeding out of their noses or stomachs; I just saw them knocked out cold, and they woke up a couple of minutes later. They got out of the Hummers, and everybody fell like dominoes all over the place. They didn't give you a chance to try to rebel. No more rioting. Everybody just fell out. It was a way to make you stop, no more acting crazy in riots. You will just do what we tell you to do, and everybody just fell down. They arrested the people who needed to be arrested that fast. Nobody lost their life; nobody got hurt. They were just arrested because they were already on top of you. When you were waking up, you were in handcuffs. You're done. No more rioting, no more protesting, nobody acting crazy. It was mounted on cars; I saw it mounted on Hummers, and all they did was turn it, and everybody fell down. I said, "Is this the same technology that they use, just turning the volume down so it doesn't make everybody go bloody everywhere?" Maybe there are strengths to it. I don't know. But this is what I saw in 2014. I saw this on July 6th, 2014. I got caught up in the spirit, and the Lord took me out of my body. I tried to warn people about this, about the drones and everything that's coming since 2014. The Lord said all this, and here we are seeing it. They're saying, "We've never seen anything like this. We've never seen anybody use anything like this before. What is this?" The United States is not someone to mess with. I said, "That's nothing compared to what I've seen." A blue light, a blue energy that's endless for planes and jets—a fuel that never needs to be redone. You don't have to fill it up anymore; it runs off a gallon of water. I saw jet engine fuel that burns off a tank, and it's sufficient like nuclear power. The Lord said it's big; it's better than splitting an atom. Have I made that public? Not very much. I haven't talked about that, have I? Well, I won't say anything else about that. I'm pretty open about everything, y'all, but there are certain things that I see in rooms and places that I just don't talk about. I said probably a little bit more tonight than I ever have about that. It's just a new technological thing that's about to take place that jets will be run off of. I saw the mathematical equations of how to operate it, how to solve the math equations to make it happen. In my mind, I'm simple and don't know what I'm looking at, but I can see the mathematical equations of how to make it happen for this new energy. People say they heard it, that I talked about it. They heard me say that. Okay, good. I saw it; I've seen the labs. It was all written on a board, and I saw these men in white suits making it. I could see the equations. One day soon, you'll have energy in cars and planes that won't use fossil fuels. They'll try to create this new kind of energy. Then I saw portals, how they were trying to go into the future through demonic portals. It was some kind of Stargate. I saw them walking through this thing, trying to be translated through demonic portals like astral projection. It was a satanic thing, but they were harnessing it with this energy and using it. People say there's no such thing as time travel. I don't know how they were doing it, but they were going to the future. They were doing something, and it looked like it was out of hell. It's the same thing they're trying to do with CERN and these dark things I saw. I heard "dark matter." I could see some kind of blue light. It was beautiful; it looked like a sapphire. As it was being mixed with this other element, it was making their faces glow with this blue light. The whole thing was being contained. They couldn't get it to sustain; it would only burn for a second and then burn up like a light bulb. Like Thomas Edison said, it didn't have the right frequency. It was a mathematical equation. When they fixed it, it ran continually. It started building, and I could hear it making a noise in the room. I could see this thing power up while they were all plotting. It kept going, and then I could see all these bubbles at the bottom starting to come up. The engine started turning. It was for a new kind of jet, and it was all about math. It was pretty neat. I liked to look at it. I like to go back there and watch these people create this stuff that looks like it'd be worth billions and billions of dollars. You know, it's pretty neat watching them, and I could see the water bubbling, but it wasn't boiling. The water was bubbling without boiling; it looked like it was boiling, but it was not. It was energy. And they harnessed water by mixing it and doing something. It was a new thing that's coming, and it makes oil and gas look like something from the past. It's clean, but this is a lot more powerful than splitting an atom, like nuclear, but it was a blue light. Now I know that Kim Clement saw a blue energy coming, bringing healing to people. This is not what I saw. I saw a blue light that creates a new wave of energy. It's a new form of money. And they say, 'Well, Brandon, how would that make the fossil fuels go up? And how would all these things happen?' I don't know. I don't know why, because I saw Iraq coming up out of the ashes for a great new economy and all these things coming for Iraq in the days ahead, and Persia will lose its hold. That's what we're seeing right now. They're losing their grip. The Prince of Persia is losing his grip. Iran's in trouble. A major revival is coming to Iran. But when you see these new kinds of energies coming—and this will come out of AI and some of the things that I've seen about this—it's pretty wild because, in my mind, I don't know what I'm seeing. I just see a nuke. But I could even see how the motor was made. I could see how it was turning. And I was thinking, 'What in the world?' It wasn't like an eight-cylinder engine; it was a turbine. It was turning. It was pretty cool, though. So, one day soon, you'll see things flying in the sky with it powering them, and you'll remember this video and you'll say, 'I remember when he said that.'
